author: bakrananas99
title: abubakr
content: absolutely love the app. been lookin for somethin like this for a whole. dont know why its not on top of the list-_-

author: doyler44
title: Exceptionally good
content: I have been using this Flac player for about three years it is absolutely brilliant one day I just found a bug where the audio wasn’t sounding exactly right and I thought that I should tell them that and I did and within one day they fixed the issue which I’m amazed by they really listen if there’s any problems, absolutely excellent. I recommend this app highly.

author: Steve Dawards
title: Suberb!
content: I've been using this app for 3 months now, and it's flawless, well designed, and has all the features one needs to listen to FLAC music files, create and organize albums, etc. Please keep updating this app!!!
